---
title: "All Learning Tracks Overview"
subtitle: "Choose Your Adventure Through Computer Science"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: true
---

# 🗺️ All Learning Tracks

CS Quest Adventures offers multiple learning paths, each designed to teach different aspects of Computer Science through engaging, interactive quests.

---

## 🐍 Python Quest Track

**Perfect for:** Absolute beginners, first-time programmers  
**Difficulty:** Beginner  
**Total Quests:** 19  
**Estimated Time:** ~20 hours  

### What You'll Learn
Master Python programming from fundamentals to advanced concepts including variables, data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented programming.

### Features
- ✅ In-browser code execution (Pyodide)
- ✅ JupyterLite environment
- ✅ Downloadable notebooks
- ✅ Interactive challenges

[Explore Python Track →](tracks/python/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

---

## 🦀 Rust Quest Track

**Perfect for:** Those with programming experience, systems enthusiasts  
**Difficulty:** Intermediate  
**Total Quests:** 19  
**Estimated Time:** ~25 hours

### What You'll Learn
Learn Rust's unique approach to systems programming, including ownership, borrowing, and zero-cost abstractions.

### Features
- ✅ Rust Playground integration
- ✅ Parallel to Python track structure
- ✅ Memory safety concepts
- ✅ Performance-focused learning

[Explore Rust Track →](tracks/rust/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

---

## 🎮 Pygame Quest Track

**Perfect for:** Python programmers ready to build games  
**Difficulty:** Intermediate  
**Total Quests:** 7 complete games  
**Estimated Time:** ~30 hours

### What You'll Build
Create 7 complete, playable games from Maze Explorer to Dungeon Crawler, learning game development patterns along the way.

### Features
- ✅ Complete working games
- ✅ Progressive difficulty
- ✅ Full source code
- ✅ UV package manager

[Explore Pygame Track →](tracks/pygame/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

---

## 🎯 Recommended Learning Paths

### Path 1: Complete Beginner → Game Developer
1. [Getting Started](intro/what-is-cs.qmd)
2. [Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd) (19 quests)
3. [Pygame Track](tracks/pygame/index.qmd) (7 games)

**Total Time:** ~50 hours

---

### Path 2: Python → Systems Programming
1. [Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd) (19 quests)
2. [Rust Track](tracks/rust/index.qmd) (19 quests)

**Total Time:** ~45 hours

---

### Path 3: Quick Start for Experienced Programmers
Jump directly to the track that interests you:
- Already know a language? Try [Rust Track](tracks/rust/index.qmd)
- Want to build games? Start [Pygame Track](tracks/pygame/index.qmd)
- Need fundamentals? Begin [Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd)

---

## 🔮 Future Tracks

More adventures coming soon:

- ⚡ **JavaScript Track** - Web development fundamentals
- 📊 **Data Science Track** - Analytics and visualization
- 🌐 **Web Development Track** - Full-stack web apps
- ⚙️ **C++ Track** - Advanced systems programming

[Learn about adding new tracks →](sitedocs/ADDING_NEW_TRACKS.md)

---

## 📊 Track Comparison

| Track | Difficulty | Quests | Time | Prerequisites |
|-------|-----------|--------|------|---------------|
| Python 🐍 | Beginner | 19 | ~20h | None |
| Rust 🦀 | Intermediate | 19 | ~25h | Programming basics |
| Pygame 🎮 | Intermediate | 7 | ~30h | Python knowledge |

---

## 🚀 Ready to Start?

Choose your adventure:

[🐍 Python](tracks/python/index.qmd){.btn .btn-success}
[🦀 Rust](tracks/rust/index.qmd){.btn .btn-warning}
[🎮 Pygame](tracks/pygame/index.qmd){.btn .btn-danger}

Or [learn about CS first →](intro/what-is-cs.qmd)
